channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Current
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Current from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Albuterol Sulfate Solution (76204-027-01)
item.description: Albuterol Sulfate, Solution, 2.5 mg/.5 mL (NDC 76204-027-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-01 Company: Ritedose Pharmaceuticals, LLC
